title: Italian Options Paper Raffia Ribbon 7mm x 100M - Fuchsia Pink
availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Ideal for many applications including gift packaging, floral arrangements, paper crafts and much more. Paper Raffia Ribbon is perfect for creating a natural rustic look or alternatively a stylish modern vibrant colourful look
description: Fuchsia Pink 100% natural paper raffia ribbon adds stylish impact to any craft project. Whether you are creating a traditional, classic or modern look. Strong but soft and durable but pliable, this natural ribbon is extremely easy to work with in any application. Ideal for gift packaging, floral arrangements, paper crafts, and much more. Made from 100% natural fibres. Biodegradable and recyclable. Paper Raffia creates the perfect eco-friendly on trend look.
